plugins.name: aws-readonly
plugins.description: Safe AWS access for Claude — read-only commands run automatically, writes are handed back to you as paste-able CLI commands. Credentials come from a read-only key file mounted in your Cowork folder.

plugins.name: azure-readonly
plugins.description: Safe Azure access for Claude — read-only commands run automatically as a Reader service principal, writes are handed back to you as paste-able az CLI commands. Credentials come from a read-only service principal file mounted in your Cowork folder.

plugins.name: gcp-readonly
plugins.description: Safe Google Cloud access for Claude — read-only commands run automatically under a read-only gcloud configuration, writes are handed back to you as paste-able CLI commands. Credentials come from a read-only service-account key file mounted in your Cowork folder.

plugins.name: x-readonly
plugins.description: Read-only X (Twitter) lookups for Claude — profiles, posts, search, follower counts, and posts by id via the X API v2. Uses an app bearer token mounted in your Cowork folder. Never posts, deletes, likes, or follows.
